# CWE-521: strong password policy enforced before persistence.
lang: go
file: CWE-521-safe.go
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"
	"unicode"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
	"golang.org/x/crypto/bcrypt"
	"gorm.io/gorm"
)

type signupBody struct {
	Email    string `json:"email"`
	Password string `json:"password"`
}

func RegisterUser(c *gin.Context, db *gorm.DB) {
	var body signupBody
	if err := c.ShouldBindJSON(&body); err != nil {
		c.String(http.StatusBadRequest, err.Error())
		return
	}
	if !strongPassword(body.Password) {
		c.String(http.StatusBadRequest, "password too weak")
		return
	}
	hash, _ := bcrypt.GenerateFromPassword([]byte(body.Password), bcrypt.DefaultCost)
	db.Exec("INSERT INTO users(email, password_hash) VALUES (?, ?)", body.Email, string(hash))
	c.Status(http.StatusCreated)
}

func strongPassword(pw string) bool {
	if len(pw) < 12 {
		return false
	}
	var upper, lower, digit bool
	for _, r := range pw {
		switch {
		case unicode.IsUpper(r):
			upper = true
		case unicode.IsLower(r):
			lower = true
		case unicode.IsDigit(r):
			digit = true
		}
	}
	return upper && lower && digit
}
